notes: The d-dimensional hyperspherical order nu=ell+(d-2)/2 reduces to nu=ell+1 for d=4.
Boundary quantization is represented by BesselJZero[ell+1,q]/R; fundamental J1 root is recorded.
Fundamental half-Bessel drop (J1 first zero to J1/2 first zero pi) is about 18.0106 percent.
Subtracting ordinary matter stress leaves sound stress plus entropy-fold stress.
T_eff = T_matter + T_sound + c^4/(8 pi G ellP^2) Sigma decomposes exactly.
The causal exponential accumulation kernel integrates to one over the past-time variable s=t-tau.
Accumulated curvature minus matter-only curvature equals accumulated sound plus Planck-scaled entropy-fold residual.
Planck-scaled charges multiply to the ordinary gravitational fine-structure coupling G mX mY/(hbar c).
Isotope gravitational charge is ordinary particle mass accounting minus binding energy over c^2, scaled by mP.
Variance of the average charge shrinks as sigma_q^2/N.
After subtracting ordinary mass-energy curvature, the testable residual is sound plus entropy-fold curvature.
